beats: Lin Che pulls the cloth off the mirror.
The reflection shows a version of himself that looks up half a second slower, but smiles first.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: He pulls off the cloth. The person in the mirror looks up half a second slower, but smiles first.

prompt.positive: Medium close-up of Lin Che's reflection in a dusty mirror, slight time delay effect, eerie smile, dim basement light, psychological horror, shallow depth of field.
